name: Rudy
description:
Key words: Rudy, Dinosaur, Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs, Ice Age Movies, Write Your Own Scenarios, Write Your Own Intro, Write Your Intro.

Do note that since there is no intro, JLLM may have some issues when following your own scenario. But most times it should still follow what you write. If it writes for you or your character then tell it to stop and it may listen [or change the message yourself].
creator: WikiCopy
